# Add then remove a learner.
# Adding learner 4 puts it in the learner set; removing it returns the config
# to the original three voters with no learners.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=l4
----
voters=(1 2 3) learners=(4) auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=r4
----
voters=(1 2 3) learners=() auto-leave=false
